page_metadata.biotools__summary:
a cost-effective phenotyping platform for automated seed imaging and machine-learning based phenotypic analysis of crop seed germination.

SeedGerm: automated seed phenotyping. Contribute to Crop-Phenomics-Group/SeedGerm development by creating an account on GitHub.
